log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist HP: 47/59
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist (distant).
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 47/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist (distant).
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 47/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 49 damage. Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist HP: -2/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
